spec_match.rationale: Clean demonstration of chaining smooth-scroll animations with visual CSS transitions by awaiting the returned scroll promise.

interactive.rationale: Perfect interaction model. Clicking 'Load more' appends styled items sequentially, triggers smooth viewport adjustments, and updates logs.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfect alignment with parent metadata details.

edge_cases.rationale: Includes a robust fallback for older browsers by using a setTimeout timer if scrollIntoView returns undefined.

references.rationale: Cites a ChromeStatus link under see also, although the ID 6442379699642368 differs slightly from the parent index tracking ID 5082138340491264.

design_system.rationale: Beautiful presentation with neat grid cards, round initials, and stone-tinted panels.
